description_long: A male adult figure is depicted wearing a long, fitted trench coat with a high collar and quilted detailing on the shoulders. Underneath, he has a simple shirt and a utility-style belt with visible pouches or attachments. His pants are slim-fitting and tucked into tall, buckled boots that reach mid-calf. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial features are clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban look with a hint of tactical or futuristic influence.
description: A male adult in a long, high-collared trench coat, utility belt, and tall buckled boots, with short, neat hair and a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared trench coat, utility belt, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coat's length, fitted sleeves, and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat with a center slit and the boots' rear buckles.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's fit and arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat with high collar, fitted shirt, utility belt, slim pants, and tall buckled boots
